atlassian search-jira-issues-using-jql

Search issues with JQL

USAGE:
  atlassian search-jira-issues-using-jql --cloud-id <value> --jql <value> --max-results <value> --next-page-token <value>

OPTIONS:
  --cloud-id                   <string>  required — Cloud ID
  --jql                        <string>  required — JQL query
  --max-results                <number>  optional — Max results
  --next-page-token            <string>  optional — Page token
